task_completion.description: Agent opens the Sugar Write application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sugar Write (or default word processor) application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent includes the exact heading 'Top 5 Horsepower'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Top 5 Horsepower' is clearly visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Agent lists exactly 5 cars under the horsepower heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 5 car names are listed directly below or following the 'Top 5 Horsepower' heading.

task_completion.description: Agent includes the exact heading 'Top 5 MPG'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Top 5 MPG' is clearly visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Agent lists exactly 5 cars under the MPG heading.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 5 car names are listed directly below or following the 'Top 5 MPG' heading.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the document as classic_cars_report.odt in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal confirms the file 'classic_cars_report.odt' is saved in '/home/ga/Documents', or the word processor window title reflects the saved filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sugar Write GUI to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Sugar Write graphical interface to format and write the text, rather than generating the ODT file purely via terminal commands or background scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually analyzed the mpg.csv dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent opening mpg.csv in a spreadsheet viewer, text editor, or using terminal/Python commands to read, filter, and sort the data.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the document content within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document content is seen being typed or pasted into the Sugar Write application, not magically appearing without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/classic_cars_report.odt. Dataset location: /home/ga/Documents/mpg.csv. Required exact headings: 'Top 5 Horsepower' and 'Top 5 MPG'. The document must contain exactly 5 car names under each heading.
